DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CARL GOSLINE'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER THAT MATTERS BE DEEMED ADMITTED IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO RESPOND TO DEFENDANT'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE. THE FOLLOWING FACTS ARE DEEMED ADMITTED: 1) ON JANUARY 17, 2001, PLAINTIFF WAS OPERATING AN UNINSURED MOTOR VEHICLE; AND (2) ON JANUARY 17, 2009, PLAINTIFF WAS THE OWNER OF AN UNINSURED MOTOR VEHICLE. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT PROVIDED EVIDENCE OF THE HOURLY RATE AND AMOUNT OF TIME DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL SPENT IN CONNECTION WITH THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PRO TEM JUDGE: ERNST HALPERIN; NOT REPORTED. = (302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANT CARL GOSLINE Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling And Directing Pltf To Appear For A Depositions IS A DUPLICATE ENTRY.

Notice Of Motion For An Order Compelling Pltf To Provide A Response To Deft'S Demand For Inspection And Production Documents
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant's Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiff To Provide A Response To Deft'S Demand For Inspection And Production Documents
IS GRANTED. Plaintiff has waived all objections by failing to respond to Defendant's Demand for Inspection and Production of Documents, Set One. Plaintiff shall produce documents and serve code-compliant, verified responses to Defendant's inspection demands without objection no later than August 6, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin; Not reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Pltf To Respond To Form Interrogatoriesq
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANT CARL GOSLINE'S Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Respond To Form Interrogatories is GRANTED. Plaintiff has waived all objections by failing to respond to Defendant's Form Interrogatories, Set One. Plaintiff shall serve code-compliant, verified responses without objection no later than August 6, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin; Not reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion For An Order Compelling And Directing Pltf To Appear For A Deposition
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
DEFENDANT CARL GOSLINE'S Motion For An Order Compelling And Directing Plaintiff To Appear For A Deposition - Plaintiff has waived all objections by failing to respond to Defendant's Notice of Deposition. Plaintiff shall appear for deposition at the offices of Defendant's counsel, 7677 Oakport Street, Suite 870, Oakland, California on August 8, 2012 at 10:00 a.m.
ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin; Not reported.
= (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn For An Order That Matters Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT CARL GOSLINE'S Motion For An Order That Matters Be Deemed Admitted is GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to respond to Defendant's Requests for Admission, Set One. The following facts are deemed admitted: 1) On January 17, 2001, plaintiff was operating an uninsured motor vehicle; and (2) On January 17, 2009, plaintiff was the owner of an uninsured motor vehicle. The request for sanctions is DENIED. Defendant has not provided evidence of the hourly rate and amount of time Defendant's counsel spent in connection with the motion. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin; Not reported. = (302/JPT)
